query: GPU AI workstation compact Germany under €650

results.title: RTX 4070 Super Compact Review — TechSpec DB
results.content: The RTX 4070 Super Compact measures 267 mm and draws 220W TDP. Ideal for compact workstation builds. Available from multiple German distributors under €670.

results.title: Best GPUs for Compact AI Workstations 2024
results.content: For compact AI workstations requiring GPUs under 300 mm, top picks include RTX 4070 Super Compact (267 mm, 220W) and RTX 4060 Ti (240 mm, 165W).

results.title: German B2B GPU Supplier Comparison
results.content: Leading German GPU distributors for B2B include Vendor A, Vendor B, and Vendor C. Vendor B specializes in compact workstation components with fast delivery.
